textByHash.aaa5ae5598e69fb9f27750cf5697f4850b0ec706: What if I start craving brains?
textByHash.0929519134a1afc9533bce7a623ca7a17f5dc99b: I don't even know what one of those is!
textByHash.1105904ef28b80c4c395b463f9e13d3943e32640: Something fell off! Something fell off!
textByHash.9923a2ab4c8ecfaa97a0e3e2a07cd2e34fc230c8: I wish I was back in my own body.
textByHash.c7f25497810605747ede70890e195dd7450e7a52: I can feel my brain thumping about in here when I shake my head.
textByHash.c39169bf4d14b2a90bad2dc5bd1b9fbf8a09e9c9: I don't want to be stuck this way!
